author: mark
text:
Guard legacy-worktree migration against silent data loss

bl-8a9a's in-place migration captured the legacy balls/tasks via fetch + reset --hard FETCH_HEAD and then force-removed .balls/worktree, silently dropping any uncommitted edit or untracked file. first_contact now runs git status --porcelain in the legacy worktree before any state-repo init and refuses the migration with a diagnostic that names the dirty paths and the recovery command. No partial state is materialized on the abort, so a retry after committing is a clean first contact.

author: nominating
text: Re-merge from main pushed state_repo.rs (303) and state_repo_tests.rs (323) over the 300-line cap; split migration helpers + test to sibling modules and re-review.
